commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a memory-core multi-file indexing path that prepares dirty memory-file chunks together for provider runtime batch embedding, while preserving per-file index writes and adding a regression test.

PR surface: Source +86, Tests +44. Total +130 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows memory files are indexed through per-file tasks, and each dirty file calls the batch embedding path with only that file's chunks; I did not run the repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review, CI status, and comfort with the disclosed non-live-provider proof gap.
